hooks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const d=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(0,'utf8'));const f=(d.tool_input&&d.tool_input.file_path)||(d.tool_response&&d.tool_response.filePath)||'';if(/\.(js|jsx)$/.test(f))process.stdout.write(f)" | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && npx prettier --write "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true

branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ "$branch" = "main" ]; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Blocked: never commit directly to main. Create a feat/ or fix/ branch first (CLAUDE.md)."}}'; fi
